title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Kia India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Kia India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India Holdings Services in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India Holdings Services:
Kia India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
